inputs.name: active
inputs.description:
Defines whether the slider handle is active.

Note: An active slider handle is currently being interacted with.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Defines whether the slider handle is disabled.

Note: A disabled slider handle cannot be interacted with.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description:
Defines the maximum value of the slider handle.

Note: The value should be greater than the min property of the parent ui5-slider.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description:
Defines the minimum value of the slider handle.

Note: The value should be less than the max property of the parent ui5-slider.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Defines the value of the slider handle.

Note: The value should be between the min and max properties of the parent ui5-slider.
